# fpcloud_database (Resource)

Manages a Fogpipe managed database.

## Example Usage

```terraform
resource "fpcloud_database" "main" {
  project_id = fpcloud_project.production.id
  name       = "maindb"
  version    = "17"
  plan       = "standard"

  backup {
    enabled   = true
    schedule  = "0 3 * * *"
    retention = "30d"
  }
}
```

<!-- schema generated by tfplugindocs -->
## Schema

### Required

- `name` (String) The name of the database.
- `project_id` (String) The project ID this database belongs to.

### Optional

- `backup` (Attributes) Backup configuration for the database. (see [below for nested schema](#nestedatt--backup))
- `engine` (String) The database engine (e.g. postgres).
- `plan` (String) The database plan (e.g. starter, standard, premium).
- `version` (String) The database engine version.

### Read-Only

- `connection_string` (String, Sensitive) The full connection string for the database.
- `created_at` (String) The time the database was created.
- `host` (String) The database host address.
- `id` (String) The unique identifier of the database.
- `password` (String, Sensitive) The database password.
- `port` (Number) The database port.
- `status` (String) The current status of the database.
- `username` (String) The database username.

<a id="nestedatt--backup"></a>
### Nested Schema for `backup`

Optional:

- `enabled` (Boolean) Whether scheduled backups are enabled.
- `retention` (String) Backup retention period (e.g. 30d).
- `schedule` (String) Cron schedule for automated backups.
